title: TCP Segment Encapsulation and Flow
description: Illustrates the creation, encapsulation, and transmission of a TCP segment within a network packet.
relationships: Application Data is encapsulated with a TCP Header to form a TCP Segment
TCP Segment is encapsulated within the Data/Payload field of an IP Packet
IP Packet is encapsulated within the Data/Payload field of a Network Frame (e.g., Ethernet) for transmission
